summary: This is a minimal stub post linking to Joel Spolsky's keynote talk at Slush 2016 in Helsinki. The post contains virtually no written content beyond a single sentence introducing a 20-minute video. The talk's title suggests it covers how software developers are shaping the future through the products and systems they build. No substantive arguments or details are presented in the post itself.
key_points: Joel gave a keynote at Slush 2016 in Helsinki titled 'Developers are Writing the Script for the Future'
The post is essentially a video embed with no written analysis or argument
The title implies developers hold outsized influence over how the future unfolds through the software they create
money_quotes: Developers are Writing the Script for the Future.
key_insight: This is a video-only post with no substantive written content to analyze beyond the provocative title suggesting developers shape the future.
